steps.title: Find the median position
steps.content:
There are $25$ objects, so the median is the $13$th value when the heights are ordered:
$$
\frac{25+1}{2}=13
$$

steps.title: Locate the histogram interval
steps.content:
The first interval contains $8$ objects. The next interval contains $6$ more, bringing the cumulative count to
$$
8+6=14
$$
So the $13$th value lies in the $101$ to $200$ centimeter interval.

steps.title: Choose the matching height
steps.content: Among the choices, $155$ is the only value in the $101$ to $200$ centimeter interval. The answer is C.
